sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6344" key="a)nagko/sitos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναγκό-σῑτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n6344.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eating perforce,</tr_> i. e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">getting what one can,</tr_> epith. of parasites, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0433.tlg001:44" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crates Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0484.tlg001:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nicostr.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
